title: 10 Pcs Acrylic Place Card Holder Clear Table Numbers Stands 3cm Card Display Holder with Cards Slot Wedding Arcylic Sign Holders for Meeting Table Wedding Office
features: [Premium Acrylic Material] These table number holders are made of high-density acrylic, ensuring durability and longevity. Polished edges provide a smooth surface. The sturdy construction resists cracking or warping, allowing for repeated use at various events. These acrylic table number holders maintain their clarity and won't fade or yellow over time

[Practical Size] Each place card measures approximately 1.2 x 1 x 0.3 inches, with a card slot depth of 0.2 inches and a width of 0.12 inches. This compact size makes the place card holders easy to store and transport while providing ample stability

[Versatile Applications] These place card holders can be used as wedding table number holders, restaurant menu displays, office meeting signage, and business card holders. The minimalist design complements a variety of decor styles, from elegant weddings to professional business settings

[Stable Display Performance] The card stands feature a weighted base, ensuring excellent stability during use. Cards are displayed at a natural 60-80 degree angle for optimal visibility and readability. The precise card slot dimensions securely hold a variety of card types without slipping or falling

[Complete Package Contents] This set includes 10 acrylic stands to meet your event needs. Each unit comes with protective film on both sides to prevent scratches during transportation and storage. The ample quantity allows for consistent display on all tables or stations at the event
